message:
fix(security): harden wish SSH server + fix char-boundary panics across demo_showcase

wish crate — security hardening:
- handler.rs: Reject auth_none by default when no auth handlers are
  configured (previously accepted any connection). New allow_no_auth
  option provides explicit opt-in for unauthenticated access.
- handler.rs: Cap SSH input buffer at 64KB to prevent memory exhaustion
  from malicious/misbehaving clients sending unbounded data.
- auth/authorized_keys.rs: Reject usernames containing path traversal
  characters (/, \, .., \0) to prevent directory traversal attacks when
  loading per-user authorized_keys files.
- auth/password.rs: Fix constant_time_eq() to iterate over the longer
  of both inputs, preventing length-leaking timing side-channel. XOR
  accumulates differences across all bytes; length mismatch seeds the
  result register to ensure rejection.
- lib.rs: Add allow_no_auth field to ServerOptions with default false,
  document the security implications of enabling it.

demo_showcase — fix char-boundary panics:
- Replace all byte-index string slicing (&s[..n]) with char-aware
  truncation (s.chars().take(n).collect()) across 5 locations:
  - app.rs: help modal line truncation + notification preview
  - data/mod.rs: log target column truncation
  - pages/docs.rs: document title truncation
  - pages/jobs.rs: log message truncation in job detail view
  These prevent panics on multi-byte UTF-8 content (CJK, emoji, etc.)

Other crate updates:
- bubbles/list.rs, bubbles/viewport.rs: minor adjustments
- bubbletea/program.rs, charmed_log, glow/github.rs, lipgloss/renderer.rs,
  ssh.rs: concurrent agent work
- wish/tests: update test assertions for new auth behavior

Beads sync: updated issue tracker status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -340,6 +340,7 @@ async fn run_server_with_auth<H: wish::auth::AuthHandler + 'static>(
                 theme,
                 animations,
                 mouse: true, // Enable mouse for SSH sessions
+                max_width: None,
             };
 
             App::with_config(app_config)
